displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: Redemption #1: A Gathering of Jedi
synopsis: Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 1 is the first issue in the Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Redemption series of comics. It was published by Dark Horse Comics on July 22, 1998.
title: Tales of the Jedi: Redemption #1: A Gathering of Jedi
